case_title: PARHAM P ARVIN VS. FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-04-2016 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO OCT-25-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 FOR ALL PARTIES TO BE PRESENT. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF PARHAM P. ARVIN AND REPRESENTATIVE FROM FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY, INC., FIELD CLAIMS SUPERVISOR VICTOR LIU. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,969.00 FILED BY ARVIN, PARHAM P AS TO DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-20-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-20-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-04-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 IN ORDER TO BE HEARD IN CONJUNCTION WITH THE MATTER ENTITLED PARHAM P. ARIN VS. KENNETH GRAESSLE, SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT NUMBER CSM-16-853004. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF PARHAM P. ARIN & DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE VICTOR LIU, SUPERVISOR AT FARMER'S INSURANCE COMPANY, INC. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY, INC.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARVIN, PARHAM P ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED AS STATED BY BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARVIN, PARHAM P AS TO DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-08-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. FILED BY DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY, INC.
ORDER CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF TO OCTOBER 25, 2016 AT 3:30PM SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED AS STATED BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF PARHAM P. ARVIN. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT FARMERS INSURANCE COMPANY, INC'S REPRESENTATIVE VICTOR LIU. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
